arts.ttl: Guirassy grabs first-half hat-trick for Guinea
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund striker Serhou Guirassy scored a first-half hat-trick in 29 minutes for Guinea in their 4-1 win over Ethiopia.

arts.ttl: Preview: Liberia vs. Equatorial Guinea - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Monday's Africa Cup of Nations Qualifying clash between Liberia and Equatorial Guinea, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
